pages.text: The Beneath has a full set of new biomes to explore! The Beneath can be split into three vertical layers, each with their own set of biomes. Each one is more hot and dangerous as you descend!

pages.title: Salt Caves
pages.text: Like a warm ocean breeze, this biome is full of $(item)Halite$(). Makes for a great base location!

pages.title: Muggy Bog
pages.text: Humid and swamp-like. A safe source of wood, if you can avoid the $(thing)Crocodiles$().

pages.title: Decaying Caverns
pages.text: Nature's recyclers are hard at work in this damp region full of rot.

pages.title: Webbed Lair
pages.text: No prizes for guessing what lives here! Also features huge $(thing)Travertine$() pillars.

pages.title: Tar Pools
pages.text: Sandy like a small desert, this area contains sticky $(thing)Tar Pits$() full of oil.

pages.title: Geothermal Springs
pages.text: No Sulfur Cubes here, but this steamy biome can be a great place to find $(thing)Spring Water$() for healing.

pages.title: Thorny Grove
pages.text: A difficult to traverse biome with plants that affect you when stepped on. Watch out!

pages.title: Lush Hollow
pages.text: Hot and full of greenery! The dense ferns hides the underlying $(thing)Kaolin Clay$().

pages.title: Ash Forest
pages.text: What remains of the Lush Hollow after the frequent fires caused by the heat.

pages.title: Lava Floes
pages.text: An ore-rich $(thing)Pyroxenite$() area crisscrossed with rivers of lava.

pages.title: Basalt Deltas
pages.text: Everyone's favourite nether biome returns, and is just as dangerous to navigate as ever.
